description_long: This is a hardcover book with a predominantly beige cover and a bold red-orange band wrapping around the lower portion of the front. The cover features a centered title in large, dark red serif font, with additional smaller text above and below. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible white pages and a sturdy, squared spine. The red-orange band contains further text in white and black, giving the book a modern, eye-catching appearance. The spine displays a logo and text, and the overall finish is matte with a slight sheen.
description: A beige hardcover book with a red-orange band and bold title text, featuring a modern, clean design and visible spine logo.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the title, red-orange band with text, and the book's thickness.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the layered white pages and the red-orange band wrapping around the cover.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is visible, showing the title and the thickness of the cover and pages.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, displaying a logo and text, as well as the continuation of the red-orange band.
attribute_title_text: Il n'a qu'à faire une frange
attribute_spine_design: The spine is beige with a red-orange band at the bottom, featuring a blue and yellow circular logo and horizontal text in dark color. The design is clean and modern, with no decorative patterns.
attribute_publisher_logo: A blue and yellow circular logo is visible on the lower part of the spine.
